commit_scope: Implement M6: Whisper-tiny block 0 safetensors loading, block-0 int8 quantization via M2, and validation match via M4.

local_validation.notes: End-to-end verification runs python weight extraction, and runs validate.sh on Go, Rust, and TS sibling kernels in both source and binary modes. All kernels return 1023 (success verdict) and agree on outputs.

ci_validation.notes: Pending rebase, push, PR, and GitHub Actions checks.

deploy_validation.notes: Pending merge and public deployment verification.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Whisper-tiny block 0 is fully validated, executing block-0 transformer and LayerNorm, and matching HF reference activations under quant/dequant roundtrip.

phase_gate.reason: Local three-way validation matches reference activations perfectly; CI and public deploy verification are pending.
